channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Several black bags of Rubbish, 3rd July
item.description:
These bags of refuse have been there for a few days. It would have been good if they were collected today (Friday), in Black bin round but they have been left to be further rummaged through and strewn about by animals. Needs collection asap. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Abbey Grove, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Middle Oxford Road, 3rd July
item.description:
Plastic and joinery on path

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oxford Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Part of bed base and lumps of wood in Lamlash Garden, Elliott’s Row end., 3rd July
item.description:

item.title: Dumped fridge freezer, 3rd July
item.description:
Fridge freezer dumped along side 159 Seymour villas leading to entrance of Betts park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 143, Seymour Villas, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Washing machine dumped at bin, 3rd July
item.description:
10:20pm on 3rd July 2026, sat in bed and i heard a bang at the bus stop outside of hungry tums cafe on footscray road, i looked out my window and see a washing machine at the bin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Footscray Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Slippery path, 3rd July
item.description:
There are two peaks here which Thames say they are awaiting permits. These have been leaking since last year. Due to this there is a build up of algae and the path is slippery. Anything the council can do please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Masons Hill, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 3rd July
item.description:
Suitcase and clothing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mare Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Combermere rd covered in litter, 3rd July
item.description:
Combermere rd covered in litter. Reported multiple times over months. Requires more frequent litter picking to deal with scale of persistent daily littering

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Combermere Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Man hole cover been lifted and not replaced correctly, 3rd July
item.description:
This has happened today 3-7-26 man hole Covers has be lifted and not replaced correctly Man hole Cover outside number 2 and 4 Harman drive on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Harman Drive, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: Broken paving slab outside number 46., 3rd July

item.title: Vehicle offloaded from a truck in Sandale Close car park, 3rd July
item.description:
A truck brought the vehicle on to the estate and off loaded it in Sandale Close's car park on 18th June. The car has not been moved since.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sandale Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown brambles and stinging nettles growing out of tgecrailings onto tge footpath, 3rd July
item.description:
The footpath is used by a large amount of school children and they can easily get scratched or stung
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Berwick Crescent, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London

item.title: Loose manhole cover, 3rd July
item.description:
Loose manhole cover. Makes loud noise whenever a vehicle passes. Nuisance and annoyance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 252, Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
